channel.title: Vanished: Spies, Escapes & Disappearances in 60 Seconds
channel.description: Cold War double agents, daring prison escapes, and people who vanished without a trace — every story in 60 seconds.
channel.itunes:author: Vanished Vault
channel.itunes:summary: Cold War double agents, daring prison escapes, and people who vanished without a trace — every story in 60 seconds.
